testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
21:13:31.937 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.aiexpensetracker.AiExpenseTrackerApplicationTests]: AiExpenseTrackerApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:13:31.986 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.aiexpensetracker.AiExpenseTrackerApplication for test class com.aiexpensetracker.AiExpenseTrackerApplicationTests 21:13:32.053 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
